geometric_interpretation.closeout_effect: This supports closing N24 as AB5/N24-C5 with explicit flux debt, not N24-C6. A future primitive must naturalize or widen the flux/leakage envelope before N24-style optionality can become N25-ready without that constraint.
geometric_interpretation.short_read: I7-B confirms the current N24 AB5 candidates pass at the frozen 1e-9 flux bound but do not widen the flux envelope above it.

purpose: test whether current N24 AB5 candidates have legal flux room above the frozen 1e-9 bound without changing thresholds or hiding budget
